situation_summary: Platform champion Kavitha left the company unexpectedly. New owner Pooja had no platform knowledge, only 40% of features being used, all seasonal planning still done in spreadsheets. Renewal at risk due to low perceived value.
risk_signals: champion departure — Kavitha left the company
new owner with zero platform training
action_taken: Full re-onboarding session with new champion. In-person visit to Mumbai office. Seasonal forecasting module demo with Diwali sale use case. Value realisation report prepared for leadership presentation.
outcome: Renewed. Seasonal forecasting module adopted before next quarter sale. NPS improved from 31 to 58.
csm_notes: The seasonal forecasting module was the unlock. Showing Pooja a concrete use case relevant to their biggest business event (Diwali sale) made the ROI immediately obvious. Always bring industry-specific use cases to champion transition calls.
